description: After a blast in an underground mine, a ventilation officer must ensure that toxic fumes (like NOx) are cleared before allowing personnel to re-enter the area.

nodes.task_description: After the blast is fired, monitor the gas sensors in the affected area.

expected_outcome.value: Real-time gas concentration data is displayed.

nodes.task_description: Wait for the gas concentrations to fall below the mandated re-entry limits.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms when all gas levels are safe.

nodes.task_description: Once clear, give the 'all clear' signal, allowing personnel and equipment to re-enter the blast area.

expected_outcome.value: The all-clear is given, and normal operations resume.
